case_title: CHRISTOPHER LEE VS. CRISTOFER E GOMEZ MIRANDA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-20-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, CRISTOFER E GOMEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-08-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRISTOFER E GOMEZ MIRANDA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED 4-6-2023 INDICATES CLAIM WAS SERVED TO DEFENDANT ON 3-20-23 WHICH IS 8 DAYS UNTIMELY. PROOF OF SERVICE BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IS REQUIRED 25 DAYS. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-17-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE, PREVIOUS PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
